changeSet.author: Liquibase
changeSet.comment:
Atomic create-strategy function. Handles the FIRST-TIME strategy creation flow only, seeding four tables in FK order within a single transaction: sb_strategy_mstr -> sb_sub_strategy_mstr -> sb_run_mstr -> sb_access_mstr If any insert fails, the whole operation rolls back (no partial strategy).
Returns a JSONB object with the three generated IDs the service layer needs to drive the next screens: { "strategy_id": , "sub_strategy_id": , "run_id": }. (strategy_id for the strategy screen; run_id drives all downstream module screens; sub_strategy_id included for completeness / grouping.)
NOT handled here (by design -- handled in the service layer or later steps): - Data / File master entries: created later at the data-upload step, NOT at strategy creation. - "New run under existing strategy/sub-strategy": a separate, single-table operation (plain SQL in the repository), NOT this function. - Edit / add-member / remove-member / role-change / delete: separate operations (see their own changesets).
Sub-strategy name: uses the user-entered name if provided, otherwise falls back to a default derived from the strategy name.
